name: Meridian Corp
summary: General The Corporation is a bank holding company engaged in banking activities through its wholly-owned subsidiary, Meridian Bank (the Bank), a full-service, state-chartered commercial bank with offices in the Delaware Valley tri-state market, which includes Pennsylvania, New Jersey and Delaware, as well as in the Central Maryland market, and southwest Florida.
